creator: ftobin@bigfoot.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	pgpenvelope/
#	pgpenvelope/Makefile
#	pgpenvelope/files
#	pgpenvelope/files/md5
#	pgpenvelope/pkg
#	pgpenvelope/pkg/COMMENT
#	pgpenvelope/pkg/DESCR
#	pgpenvelope/pkg/PLIST
#
echo c - pgpenvelope/
mkdir -p pgpenvelope/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - pgpenvelope/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >pgpenvelope/Makefile << 'END-of-pgpenvelope/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   pgpenvelope
X# Version required:    2.6.1
X# Date created:        13 June 1999
X# Whom:                Frank Tobin <ftobin@bigfoot.com>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	pgpenvelope-2.6.2
XCATEGORIES=	mail security
XMASTER_SITES=	http://srh0710.urh.uiuc.edu/~ftobin/downloads/
X
XMAINTAINER=	ftobin@bigfoot.com
X
XUSE_PERL5=	YES
X
XMAN1=		pgpenvelope.1
X
Xdo-configure:
X		@cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${CONFIGURE_ENV} ${PERL5} Makefile.PL PREFIX=${PREFIX}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-pgpenvelope/Makefile
echo c - pgpenvelope/files
mkdir -p pgpenvelope/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - pgpenvelope/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >pgpenvelope/files/md5 << 'END-of-pgpenvelope/files/md5'
XMD5 (pgpenvelope-2.6.2.tar.gz) = ac1b017f8856a6d0624d56cb09164aa0
END-of-pgpenvelope/files/md5
echo c - pgpenvelope/pkg
mkdir -p pgpenvelope/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - pgpenvelope/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >pgpenvelope/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-pgpenvelope/pkg/COMMENT'
XPine interface to PGP5 and GPG
END-of-pgpenvelope/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - pgpenvelope/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >pgpenvelope/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-pgpenvelope/pkg/DESCR'
XPGPenvelope is a pine filter written in Perl
Xthat allows one to encrypt/sign/decrypt/verify one's
Xemail messages with GPG or PGP5.
X
XEase of installation, ease of use, and a nice interface were the
Xprimary goals during developement.
X
XAlso included are methods to verify signed messages through
Xprocmail with ease.
X
X
XWWW: http://www.bigfoot.com/~ftobin/resources.html
X    
X- Frank Tobin
Xftobin@bigfoot.com
END-of-pgpenvelope/pkg/DESCR
echo x - pgpenvelope/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >pgpenvelope/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-pgpenvelope/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/pgpenvelope
Xbin/pgpenvelope_encrypt
Xbin/pgpenvelope_decrypt
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/Setup.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/SetupFile.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/WorkDir.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/PGP5/Keyring.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/PGP5/Key.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/GPG/Keyring.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/GPG/Key.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/PrefsFile.pm
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/GPG
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope/PGP5
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/PGPEnvelope
X
END-of-pgpenvelope/pkg/PLIST
exit
